description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, giving it a streamlined and elongated appearance. The body is composed of a mix of metal and polymer, with a matte black finish dominating the exterior. A telescopic scope is mounted on the top rail, suggesting precision targeting capabilities. The rifle has a pistol grip and a fixed stock, both ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The overall silhouette is compact yet robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a suppressor, scope, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the circular profile of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the suppressor, scope, pistol grip, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel and suppressor aligned centrally.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the magazine, grip, and scope visible from the other side.
